points.text: Novartis executed a ~$1.44B deal with Orionis to advance molecular glue therapies targeting multiple undisclosed proteins.
Novartis is expanding its molecular glue strategy to target previously undruggable proteins, reinforcing its commitment to this modality in 2026.
Novartis — Orionis partnership — Molecular glue therapies for multiple targets — ~$1.44B deal signed to advance discovery and development of novel degraders.
Novartis — Expansion of molecular glue pipeline — Multiple undisclosed targets — Secured ~$1.44B partnership with Orionis to accelerate degrader discovery.
Orionis — Molecular glue discovery platform — Undisclosed targets — Partnered with Novartis in ~$1.44B deal to advance novel therapeutic candidates.
Novartis / Orionis — ~$1.44B strategic partnership — Molecular glue therapies — Deal includes upfront and milestone payments to advance multiple targets.
